headline: eBay (EBAY) Up 8.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: eBay (EBAY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: GameStop Raises eBay Stake in Takeover Fight
summary: he move signals GameStop is not backing away after eBay's board rejected its buyout approach.

headline: GameStop Hits 'Add To Cart' On EBAY Stock Again — Raises Exposure To Over 7% As Ryan Cohen Keeps Pressure On
summary: GameStop disclosed ownership of 25,000 eBay shares and additional economic exposure tied to more than 34 million shares.
